name: Buttermilk Marinated Kabobs
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Round steak, approximately 1-inch thick (24 pieces)
3 medium onions, cut into 8 pieces each (24 pieces total)
recipeInstructions:
1. FOR MARINADE: In a bowl, combine brown sugar, lemon juice, Worcestershire sauce, salt, dried basil, and dried marjoram.
2. Stir in buttermilk until well mixed.
3. Add the meat; cover and refrigerate for at least 12 hours.
4. FOR KABOBS: Parboil onions in boiling salted water until they are tender, about 6-8 minutes. Drain and rinse with cold water.
5. TO ASSEMBLE: Alternate pieces of meat with onions, zucchini slices, tomatoes, and mushrooms on each skewer.
6. Grill over hot coals, basting frequently with marinade.
7. Cook until the meat reaches your desired level of doneness (approximately 15 minutes for medium-cooked meat).
8. Makes 8 kabobs.
